description: Originally launched on Ethereum in Q3 2017, Chainlink (LINK) is used to connect real-world data to DApps and later became the native token of Chainlink chain. Now as a 1:1 price-indexing token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 LINK gives original LINK holders, users and traders instant finality, ultra-low fees, and AI contract capability for faster, more secure, and more scalable use worldwide.
name: Chainlink Token
